bottom_line: Add an explicit checklist to the Backend prompt template requiring agents to confirm what they did NOT modify, and add a deterministic seed flag to targeted test invocations, to reduce fix cycles and mask-flaky-test risk on subtractive changes.
coverage_notes: S09/S10 logs (378KB/366KB): read tail-500 + grep for FAILED/PASSED. S01-S05 logs: read in full. Fix-cycle logs S02_fix1 and S05_fix1: read in full. Design doc read in full. DB: not queried (soft-step semantics; worktree logs primary source).

findings.title: S01 introduced an out-of-scope modification to globs_intersect — caught by S02 fix cycle
findings.recommendation: Add an explicit checklist section to the Backend prompt template: 'Confirm you did NOT modify: [globs_intersect body, _strip_test_globs body, any function not listed above]'. This makes scope boundary violations self-evident before the agent submits its report.
evidence: .worktrees/I-00099/ai-dev/logs/I-00099_S02_fix1.log:163 — 'Design doc spec for S01: Remove _same_parent and sibling fallback... No change to globs_intersect'
.worktrees/I-00099/ai-dev/logs/I-00099_S02_fix1.log:164 — 'S01 actual: Added a Reverse anchor containment block to globs_intersect (out of scope per design doc)'
.worktrees/I-00099/ai-dev/logs/I-00099_S02_fix1.log:105-127 — diff showing S01 added 11 lines to globs_intersect beyond the sibling-rule removal
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add explicit 'did-not-modify' checklist to Backend prompt template (ai-dev/templates/Feature_Backend_prompt.md and Issue_Backend_prompt.md); analyzed in I-00099 (see ai-dev/active/I-00099/reports/I-00099_self_assess_report.md). Target file: ai-dev/templates/Feature_Backend_prompt.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: Test flakiness from random seed ordering masked real failures in S04 and S05
findings.recommendation: Add --randomly-seed=0 to targeted pytest invocations in step prompts so test order is deterministic. Also add a test-stability check to CodeReview_Final prompt: re-run on failure with a different seed before concluding a test is flaky.
evidence: .worktrees/I-00099/ai-dev/logs/I-00099_S04_run1.log:41 — test_glob_anchor_still_blocks_file_under_anchor FAILED (seed=2726543514)
.worktrees/I-00099/ai-dev/logs/I-00099_S04_run1.log:85 — test_blocks_multiple_in_flight FAILED (same run)
.worktrees/I-00099/ai-dev/logs/I-00099_S04_run2.log:41 — same tests PASSED (seed=996209880)
.worktrees/I-00099/ai-dev/logs/I-00099_S05_fix1.log:28 — test_glob_anchor_still_blocks_file_under_anchor FAILED initially, PASSED after fix applied
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add --randomly-seed=0 to pytest invocations in Backend/Test step prompts and document seed-based re-run for flaky-test investigation; analyzed in I-00099 (see ai-dev/active/I-00099/reports/I-00099_self_assess_report.md). Target: skills/iw-ai-core-testing/SKILL.md, ai-dev/templates/Feature_CodeReview_Final_prompt.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: S03 deleted obsolete test cleanly — pre-emptive guard in S04 was warranted
findings.recommendation: Retain the S04 prompt's explicit instruction to flag non-deletion as CRITICAL in the CodeReview_Tests_prompt.md template. Formalize: 'If the step is supposed to delete X and X still exists, that is a CRITICAL finding.'
evidence: .worktrees/I-00099/ai-dev/logs/I-00099_S03_run1.log:48-49 — 'Now delete test_non_test_sibling_still_blocks'
.worktrees/I-00099/ai-dev/logs/I-00099_S04_run1.log:23 — 'Grep test_non_test_sibling_still_blocks — 0 matches' (confirmed deleted)
.worktrees/I-00099/ai-dev/logs/I-00099_S04_run1.log:24 — S04 explicitly checked for deletion as instructed and confirmed 0 matches
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Formalize deletion-check-as-critical in CodeReview_Tests prompt template (ai-dev/templates/Feature_CodeReview_Tests_prompt.md); analyzed in I-00099 (see ai-dev/active/I-00099/reports/I-00099_self_assess_report.md). Target: ai-dev/templates/Feature_CodeReview_Tests_prompt.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: Subtractive-change workflow template would better fit this item's shape
findings.recommendation: Define a minor-subtractive workflow template (or step variant) that collapses or shortens the review chain for small deletions (e.g., Backend + one CodeReview + targeted test + 3 QV gates, skipping CodeReview_Final when no new logic was introduced).
evidence: .worktrees/I-00099/ai-dev/logs/I-00099_S01_run1.log:11-15 — S01 described changes as ~40 lines deleted, no new code
Workflow manifest: 11 steps total (Backend, CodeReview, Tests, CodeReview, CodeReview_Final, 5 QV gates) for a pure deletion in one file
QV gates S06-S10 all ran cleanly in under 10s each
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Define minor-subtractive workflow template for small deletions: reduce step count and skip CodeReview_Final when no new logic introduced; analyzed in I-00099 (see ai-dev/active/I-00099/reports/I-00099_self_assess_report.md). Target: docs/IW_AI_Core_Workflow_Templates.md. Effort: M.

findings.title: S02 typo in working directory caused first run to fail — self-corrected in run 2
findings.recommendation: No action required. Agent self-corrected. Consider adding a pwd sanity check at step start for future robustness.
evidence: .worktrees/I-00099/ai-dev/logs/I-00099_S02_run1.log:23 — 'cd /home/sgeriog/dev/... No such file or directory'
.worktrees/I-00099/ai-dev/logs/I-00099_S02_run2.log — run 2 used correct path, all checks passed
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Add pwd sanity check to step startup in iw CLI to catch working directory mismatches early; analyzed in I-00099 (see ai-dev/active/I-00099/reports/I-00099_self_assess_report.md). Target: orch/cli/step_start.py. Effort: S.

findings.title: S01 read-only cross-check of batch_manager.py was done but not formally recorded
findings.recommendation: For steps that include a read-only verification task, add a field to the report template: 'Verification completed: [what was checked]'. Alternatively, add a prompt clause: 'Record in your report the specific read-only finding you confirmed.'
evidence: .worktrees/I-00099/ai-dev/logs/I-00099_S01_run1.log:10 — 'Read orch/daemon/batch_manager.py [offset=390, limit=30]'
S01 log shows read was performed but no formal finding recorded in S01 report
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add 'verification completed' field to Backend report template for read-only cross-checks; analyzed in I-00099 (see ai-dev/active/I-00099/reports/I-00099_self_assess_report.md). Target: ai-dev/templates/Feature_Backend_prompt.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: Cross-reference accuracy confirmed — reproduction tests used exact path strings
findings.recommendation: No change needed. Confirmed positive signal: agents used exact path strings as specified. This finding is recorded as a positive signal, not a finding requiring action.
